channel.title: SSpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Court revives Pentagon's ban on reporters having unescorted access
item.description: A federal appeals court on Monday allowed the Pentagon to reinstate its ban on journalists being able to enter the building without an escort, marking...

item.title: Hakeem Jeffries doubles down on call for 'maximum warfare' on Republicans
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries said he stood by his remarks about engaging in "maximum warfare" with Republicans when it came to the battle ove...

item.title: Florida jumps into the national redistricting battle with a new gerrymandered map
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis on Monday unveiled a reconfigured congressional map that would likely erase all of the gains Democrats thought they scored i...

item.title: Trump administration to pay 2 more companies to walk away from U.S. offshore wind leases
item.description: The Trump administration announced two more payouts Monday for energy companies to walk away from U.S. offshore wind projects under development.
